lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: Good day. What can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would like to buy some equipment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: Well, you must be a new arrival. I am Erdan, a descendant of Uhld.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhld? I've seen that inscribed on that big old statue down below. What's that about?

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: It's also on the fountain in the dungeon below, it displays their emblem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whose emblem?

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: The Sect of Uhld, the founders of this here guild. I may not have gained entrance to this guild in the usual fashion, but I'd expect that they'd at least inform new members of this guild's history.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps they expected you, a descendant of Uhld, to fill me in on the matter.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: Aye, that may well be the case.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: Look, I'm awfully busy, what with the recent influx of members, so I'll give you the short version for now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: The story my father told me was of a war on magic. Of god fearing men who believed nothing good would come of wielding a power that was never meant for them.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: And so the rune temples that man had created were under threat. Before long, all were destroyed and thus forgotten.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: But the wrath that these Gunnites embraced rippled through the pocket dimensions. Supposedly, a new altar of power was discovered.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The wrath altar?

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: Indeed. The temple was destroyed just as construction had finished, and a nearby nomadic group called the Sect of Uhld were not pleased with the brutality they witnessed.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: They quickly established this guild with information preservation as their core goal, for men are recorders of history and magic is key for this to last.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did the... er, Gunnites, return?

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: Of course they did, but the Sect of Uhld had used the information gained from the wrath altar, and with a spell of their own making, they destroyed the southern runecrafting crusade with much ease.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh, that's fascinating.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: Indeed it is, but I best get back to work, so unless you wish to trade, that is all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the history lesson, Erdan.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: No problem!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just passing by.

lines.speaker: Erdan
lines.text: As you wish.
